rules.description: Important transferable elements must have a stable key.
rules.fix: Add `[key=...]` using English kebab-case.

rules.description: Two elements inside the same breakpoint must not share one key.
rules.fix: Rename keys or add instance indexes such as `card-1`, `card-2`.

rules.description: The same key must not point to different logical element types across breakpoints.
rules.fix: Keep the logical type stable or declare an explicit variant.

rules.description: Repeated list/grid items need stable instance indexes.
rules.fix: Use keys such as `feature-card-1`, `feature-card-2`.

rules.description: Default names such as `Frame 53` or `Group 271` usually hide missing intent.
rules.fix: Rename the layer and add role tags where needed.

rules.description: Every layer must be classifiable as flow, absolute, or target.
rules.fix: Add layout role through structure or tags such as `flex`, `[abs]`, `[modal]`, `[state]`.

rules.description: Absolute-positioned elements must be intentional and tagged.
rules.fix: Add `[abs]` plus a role such as `[decor]`, `[asset]`, or `[overlay]`.

rules.description: A one-child wrapper without a role is likely unnecessary noise.
rules.fix: Remove the wrapper or add `[wrapper-role=...]`.

rules.description: Deep wrapper chains often make responsive mapping fragile.
rules.fix: Flatten structure or annotate each wrapper role.

rules.description: Overlapping bounds require explicit overlay/decor/absolute intent.
rules.fix: Add `[overlay]`, `[decor]`, `[abs]`, or a BRIDGE exception reason.

rules.description: Layer order is visually important but not declared as overlay/stacking intent.
rules.fix: Declare overlay scope or stacking behavior.

rules.description: Responsive root frames must declare `[bp=...]`.
rules.fix: Add explicit breakpoint tags to root frames.

rules.description: An important key exists on one breakpoint but is missing on another required breakpoint.
rules.fix: Add the element, or declare an intentional breakpoint exclusion.

rules.description: Sibling order changed across breakpoints without an order strategy.
rules.fix: Preserve semantic order or declare an order strategy.

rules.description: The same text key has different content across breakpoints.
rules.fix: Keep meaning identical or add `[content-variant=...]` with a reason.

rules.description: Strict content such as price, legal copy, or CTA changed across breakpoints.
rules.fix: Synchronize strict content or document an approved variant.

rules.description: Hidden keyed layers may contain alternative source-of-truth content.
rules.fix: Move alternatives into declared states/variants or archive them.

rules.description: Clickable elements must declare an action.
rules.fix: Add `[action=link:...]`, `[action=modal:...]`, `[action=state:...]`, or `[action=none]`.

rules.description: Link elements must point to a URL or anchor target.
rules.fix: Add a `link:` or `scroll:` action.

rules.description: A modal action must point to an existing modal target.
rules.fix: Create `[modal] [key=...]` target or change the action.

rules.description: A state action must point to an existing state target.
rules.fix: Create `[state] [key=...]` target or change the action.

rules.description: Modal targets need close behavior.
rules.fix: Add close button/action and define backdrop/escape behavior.

rules.description: Form fields need labels or accessible names.
rules.fix: Add label text and field identity.

rules.description: Forms need a submit action or declared endpoint/handler.
rules.fix: Add `[action=submit:...]` to the submit control or form.

rules.description: Interactive or dynamic components often need empty, loading, error, disabled, hover, or focus states.
rules.fix: Add required states or declare why they are not needed.

rules.description: Fixed height must be intentional.
rules.fix: Use hug/min-height or add `[height=fixed] [reason=...]`.

rules.description: Clipped surfaces need explicit overflow policy.
rules.fix: Add `[overflow=hidden]`, `[overflow=visible]`, `[overflow=scroll]`, or `[overflow=truncate]`.

rules.description: Text appears likely to clip due to fixed height or insufficient bounds.
rules.fix: Use hug height, min-height, or truncation policy.

rules.description: Text-like content should not be exported as a raster asset without reason.
rules.fix: Use native text or add asset exception reason.

rules.description: Responsive images need a crop/focal strategy.
rules.fix: Declare focal point, fit mode, or crop policy.

rules.description: Video/Lottie/complex media should define fallback behavior.
rules.fix: Add poster, fallback asset, controls, and autoplay policy.

rules.description: Color, typography, radius, or spacing values appear detached from tokens.
rules.fix: Use design tokens or declare an exception.

rules.description: Interactive target is smaller than recommended touch size.
rules.fix: Increase hit area or declare target-specific exception.

rules.description: Text/background contrast may be insufficient.
rules.fix: Adjust colors or document intentional exception.

rules.description: The selected target adapter does not support a declared feature.
rules.fix: Change the design, add asset fallback, or choose another adapter.
